title: indigofera reducta
intro: Indigofera reducta, also known as the Australian indigo or small leaf indigo, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Indigofera reducta include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms associated with digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
